1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons in Trondheim with the high risk class

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality with centroid geometry and id

5.description: find buildings that intersect reduced quick-clay polygons

6.description: compute distance from each building to municipality centroid

7.description: deduplicate and get min distance per building

8.description: sort by distance asc and building id asc

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid_geom, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'
LIMIT 1;

1.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid_geom, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'
LIMIT 1;

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry, centroid, and bbox

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class identifiers and descriptions

3.description: get max risk class identifier (highest risk) if ordinal

4.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons in Trondheim for the high-risk class reduced by municipality bbox

5.description: get buildings in Trondheim with geometry

6.description: find buildings that intersect high-risk quick-clay polygons

7.description: compute distance from intersecting buildings to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m)

replan_trigger.error: Step 4 returned 0 rows before the plan was complete. Treat this as an empty intermediate result and revise the plan, filter, join, table choice, or predicate.

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid_geom,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
       omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'
LIMIT 1;

       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
       omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'
LIMIT 1;

args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse;
SELECT DISTINCT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse;
SELECT MAX(identifier::int) AS max_id FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse;
SELECT MAX(identifier::int) AS max_id FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse;

SELECT k.kartleggingsomradeid, k.kartleggingsomradenavn, u.objid AS utlop_objid, u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, u.omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k
JOIN kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr u
  ON ST_Intersects(k.omrade, u.omrade)
WHERE u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '5'
  AND u.omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(250339.82999591084, 7010675.560000021, 285864.4299986598, 7051059.450000035, 25833)
;

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid_geom,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
       omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT k.kartleggingsomradeid, k.kartleggingsomradenavn, u.objid AS utlop_objid, u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, u.omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k
JOIN kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr u
  ON ST_Intersects(k.omrade, u.omrade)
WHERE u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '5'
  AND u.omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(250339.82999591084, 7010675.560000021, 285864.4299986598, 7051059.450000035, 25833)
;

1.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid_geom,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
       omrade

4.sql:
SELECT k.kartleggingsomradeid, k.kartleggingsomradenavn, u.objid AS utlop_objid, u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, u.omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k
JOIN kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr u
  ON ST_Intersects(k.omrade, u.omrade)
WHERE u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '5'
  AND u.omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(250339.82999591084, 7010675.560000021, 285864.4299986598, 7051059.450000035, 25833)
;

1.description: get Trondheim kommunenummer, centroid and bbox to limit national layers

2.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in utlopomr

3.description: get utlopomr polygons for the high-risk class limited to the Trondheim bbox (chosen class value to be filled after step 2)

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim by kommunenummer (reduce buildings by municipality) with representasjonspunkt geometry

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced quick-clay utlopomr (membership filter)

6.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to the municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m) to ensure unique buildings

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid_geom,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
       omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT MAX(identifier::int) AS max_id FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse;
